trybz.name: TRYBZ London
trybz.description: Member-led club for the gay and queer community, real-life shared experiences.

big-gay-out.name: Big Gay Out
big-gay-out.description: Outdoors, adventure and social events for the LGBTQ+ community.

village-drinks.name: Village Drinks
village-drinks.description: Monthly social networking evening for London's gay professionals. Venue revealed close to the event.

lgbtq-london.name: LGBTQ+ London
lgbtq-london.description: Inclusive & diverse LGBTQ+ Meetup community for London — board games, video games, social nights, theatre, and more.

young-lgbt-pros.name: Young LGBTQ+ Professionals
young-lgbt-pros.description: Meetup community of 7k+ LGBTQ+ professionals in London. Fortnightly drinks at The Yard Bar, Soho.

elephant-park-pride.name: Elephant Park Pride
elephant-park-pride.description: Yearly LGBTQ+ Pride celebration at Elephant Park (Elephant & Castle). 2026 edition confirmed for 25 Jul 2026.

interbank.name: InterBank LGBT+ Network
interbank.description: LGBT+ networking event for finance and banking professionals in London. Held on the 3rd Thursday of every month at 6pm, plus occasional themed specials.

jake.name: JAKE
jake.description: London social events for queer men — singles mingles, parties, BBQs, and themed nights at varied venues across the city.

gaymers-inc.name: Gaymers iNC.
gaymers-inc.description: London's LGBTQ+ gamers community. Main monthly meet-up every 3rd Wednesday at The Old School Yard (TOSY). Also runs board game nights, geek quizzes, and themed RPG takeovers.

two-brewers.name: The Two Brewers
two-brewers.description: Iconic LGBTQ+ pub and cabaret venue in Clapham. Yearly Street Party in June plus a packed nightly programme of drag and dance.

clapham-pride.name: Clapham Pride
clapham-pride.description: Yearly LGBTQ+ Pride street party hosted by Arch Clapham on Voltaire Road. Free entry, drag performers, DJs and dancing into the night.

pride-in-southwark.name: Pride in Southwark
pride-in-southwark.description: Yearly free community Pride festival at Mint Street Park, Southwark. Drag, live music, readings and community stalls.

the-board-gays.name: The BoardGays
the-board-gays.description: LGBTQ+ community running four event series across board games, social-deduction games, cinema, and escape rooms — The BoardGays, Wolfgays, Filmgays and Escapegays. All posted ad-hoc on Instagram.

summer-gaymes.name: Summer Gaymes
summer-gaymes.description: Yearly LGBTQ+ summer sports day on Clapham Common — Olympic-style games and contests for the queer community.

gayns.name: Gayns
gayns.description: LGBTQ+ party series — themed specials around Valentine's, Pride, the founders' birthday and Christmas. Announced ad-hoc on Instagram.

barks-and-boys.name: Barks and Boys
barks-and-boys.description: Monthly LGBTQ+ social event for dog owners and dog lovers. Hosted at The Arzner in SE1.

mighty-hoopla.name: Mighty Hoopla
mighty-hoopla.description: Yearly two-day pop and LGBTQ+ music festival at Brockwell Park.

as-one-in-the-park.name: As One In The Park
as-one-in-the-park.description: Yearly LGBTQ+ music festival at Walpole Park, Ealing.

body-movement.name: Body Movement
body-movement.description: Yearly queer-focused electronic music and dance festival at Southwark Park.

homobloc.name: Homobloc
homobloc.description: Yearly queer dance and music festival at Mayfield Depot in Manchester. Date TBC for 2026 — historically in November.

world-prides.name: Pride Around the World
world-prides.description: Major Pride celebrations across the UK and Europe — a heads-up for anyone planning to travel.
